security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:1420 ws://localhost:1420; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'

bundle.shortDescription: Local desktop visual map for backend systems
bundle.longDescription: Backend Visual Map indexes local code and database metadata to render backend relationship maps.
